description:
Design, build, and deploy AI Agents with MindStudio: http://mindstudio.ai/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=content+referral&utm_campaign=mindstudio&utm_content=yatb&utm_term=v01

Check Out Yorby, the social media marketing tool for startups: https://www.yorby.ai?utm_source=yatb-yt

In this video, I break down my 2026 AI coding workflow and walk through every AI coding agent and tool I actually use day-to-day.

I’m constantly testing new AI tools as a tech YouTuber, but more importantly, I’m building a real startup full-time - so this setup is about shipping real products, not demos. I cover how my workflow has evolved over the last six months, why I keep things intentionally simple, and how I mix different AI models depending on the task.

We’ll cover:
- My current AI coding stack (IDE, agents, models, terminal)
- How I use Claude, Cursor, GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Pro, and more
- Why I avoid over-complicating agent workflows
- Parallel agent workflows with Git worktrees
- How I get better UI results with AI
- When I use low-code/no-code tools instead of building from scratch

This isn’t the “perfect” workflow, it’s just what’s working for me right now in 2026.

👇 Curious what your AI coding setup looks like. Drop it in the comments.

Want to work with me 1:1? Book some time with me at https://www.youraveragetechbro.com

Check out my AI-powered interview prepping tool: http://perfectinterview.ai/?utm_source=yatb-yt

Check out my latest SaaS product to start automating your job: http://montee.ai/?utm_source=yatb-yt

Follow me on TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@youraveragetechbro
Follow me on Instagram: https://instagram.com/youraveragetechbro

Timecodes:
00:00 - Introduction to My AI Coding Workflow
00:25 - Background and Context
01:30 - Overview of the Video
01:45 - Using Cursor for AI Coding
02:48 - Exploring Different AI Models
05:30 - Claude Code as My Primary AI Agent
06:46 - My Preferred UI
08:20 - PR Creator With Docs
10:03 - My Terminal of Choice: Warp
10:55 - Parallel Agent Workflow
13:56 - Antigravity as a Future Contender
14:35 - Pros and Cons of One-Shotting
16:25 - Getting Better UI Output from Your Models
18:06 - Incorporating No-Code/Low-Code Tools
18:56 - Sponsor: MindStudio
20:00 - Conclusion

chapters.title: Introduction to My AI Coding Workflow
Claude Code as My Primary AI Agent
Getting Better UI Output from Your Models

fulltitle: I Tried Every AI Coding Agent... Here's My 2026 Setup
